channels_provider_columns.name: channels_provider_columns
channels_provider_columns.value:
("channels"."provider" = 'meta_whatsapp' and "channels"."phone_number_id" is not null and "channels"."waba_id" is not null)
       or ("channels"."provider" = 'meta_instagram' and "channels"."ig_user_id" is not null and "channels"."fb_page_id" is not null)
       or ("channels"."provider" = 'waha' and "channels"."waha_session_id" is not null)

uq_contacts_workspace_phone.name: uq_contacts_workspace_phone
uq_contacts_workspace_phone.where: "contacts"."phone" is not null and "contacts"."deleted_at" is null

event_participants_subject_chk.name: event_participants_subject_chk
event_participants_subject_chk.value: "event_participants"."member_id" is not null or "event_participants"."contact_id" is not null

sla_rules_scope_id_chk.name: sla_rules_scope_id_chk
sla_rules_scope_id_chk.value: ("sla_rules"."scope_type" = 'workspace' and "sla_rules"."scope_id" is null) or ("sla_rules"."scope_type" <> 'workspace' and "sla_rules"."scope_id" is not null)

sla_rules_limits_chk.name: sla_rules_limits_chk
sla_rules_limits_chk.value: ("sla_rules"."first_response_secs" is null or "sla_rules"."first_response_secs" > 0) and ("sla_rules"."resolution_secs" is null or "sla_rules"."resolution_secs" > 0)
